slides.title: After 50, strength matters *more*, not less.
slides.sub: Muscle is use it or lose it. The good news: you can still build it at any age.

slides.title: Use it or lose it
slides.body: Muscle quietly fades with age when it goes unused. Strength training *can slow that loss* for years.

slides.title: You can still build
slides.body: Your body responds to training at any age. People in their seventies *build real strength* in months.

slides.title: Add a little over time
slides.body: Progressive overload still works. Lift a touch more, or add a rep, *as you get stronger*.

slides.title: Two sessions a week
slides.body: That is enough to make steady gains. Cover the big movements: push, pull, squat, hinge.

slides.title: Protect your independence
slides.body: Strong legs and grip keep you steady and capable. Muscle *may help protect* the years ahead.

slides.title: Stay strong for *the long run*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your movement and habits and turns each day into one simple score that protects your healthspan.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
It is never too late to get stronger. After 50, muscle matters more than ever. 💪

Progressive overload still works: add a little load over time, train twice a week, and protect your independence for decades. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your habits into one daily score → link in bio.
